subject: fix(chart,pwa): strengthen timeline presets, persist forecast horizon, fix localStorage usage
body:
- Lookback presets now use Date setMonth/setFullYear instead of fixed
  ms constants — proper calendar-aware boundaries (1M back from
  Mar 31 lands on Feb 28, not Mar 1)
- Persist forecastMonths to localStorage per workspace
  (farlume:forecast-months:{id}) with validation against allowed
  values — survives navigation without requiring DB schema migration
- Migrate usePWAUpdate checkVersionUpdate() from raw localStorage to
  safeGetItem/safeSetItem for consistent error handling
- Fix stale HISTORY entry (zoom restricted → zoom disabled)
- Add WorkspaceDetailView raw localStorage to TODO as tech debt
- Update SESSION_NOTES with full session context

Tags: chart, pwa, ux, cleanup
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: dashboard
Semver: patch
